testcase.name: Envío de solución correcta con veredicto Aceptado (AC)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:38927}, goog:processID: 138225, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:38927/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: d45a661d3ccc0cfdfa13412f15744469

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:38927}, goog:processID: 138225, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:38927/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: d45a661d3ccc0cfdfa13412f15744469 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminContestCleaner.loginAsAdmin(AdminContestCleaner.java:64) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminContestCleaner.finishRunningContestsAsAdmin(AdminContestCleaner.java:45) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.steps.Hooks.finishRunningContestsBeforeCleanContestScenarios(Hooks.java:28)
testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................skipped When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "administrador_qa".skipped Then el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo...............skipped Given el docente esta en la pagina de creacion de problemas.................skipped When crea un problema con titulo "Suma de dos números", tiempo "2", memoria "128", autor "Patito QA" y descripciones basicas.skipped Then el problema deberia ser guardado con exito.............................skipped And el problema "Suma de dos números" deberia aparecer listado..............skipped Given el docente esta en el administrador de archivos del problema "Suma de dos números".skipped When sube el archivo de casos de prueba "src/test/resources/testcases/sum_1.in".skipped Then el archivo "sum_1.in" deberia aparecer listado en la pagina............skipped When sube el archivo de casos de prueba "src/test/resources/testcases/sum_1.out".skipped Then el archivo "sum_1.out" deberia aparecer listado en la pagina...........skipped Given el participante navega a la pagina de inicio de sesion................skipped When el participante introduce el usuario "participante_qa" y clave "participante_qa".skipped Then el participante deberia ver el portal de inicio........................skipped Given el participante esta en la pagina del problema "Suma de dos números"..skipped When hace clic en el boton Enviar...........................................skipped And selecciona el lenguaje "Java" e ingresa el codigo:......................skipped Then deberia esperar la evaluacion y ver el veredicto "Accepted"............skipped

testcase.name: Envío de solución con error de compilación (CE)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:42029}, goog:processID: 138603, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:42029/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 42b78cc94adcc68bc3d024a74b79f2dd
